ops.text: PHASE 2 DONE (D: two-stage shipped to shadow, commit cd272da pushed to main): MlxDrafter (cc_steer/watcher/drafter_mlx.py) serves watcher v001-20260710-d161ca2c9ac1 from the registry (E2 watcher-lora-v2 iter1520 copied from lab adapters; metadata: base mlx-community/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507-4bit, thresholds budget 0.2373046875 / f1 0.8828125, auc 0.8534, dataset_digest a054d90e87d6f0a9, render_version 1). Drafter protocol returns Draft(text, sentinel_prob); Cascade.refiner now optional (None => fired draft ships as steer) - the E9 seam. tail_messages/strip_think/DRAFT_CHAR_CAP moved to cc_steer.rendering, lab re-imports (identity = parity guarantee); lab-vs-prod parity test GREEN (identical sentinel probs at 1e-4 + identical decisions on frozen rows). shadow.db recreated with sentinel_prob column; shadow report adds per-category hits + sentinel deciles + --journal-repo. New mlx extra (mlx-lm>=0.31.3, transformers<5.13). CLI: watch --drafter auto|spawn|mlx --stage2-threshold --refiner auto|spawn|none. DAEMON RESTARTED (pid 76965): gate lexical v001 @ 0.5 (E2's validated operating point - the metadata 0.9905 fires on zero watcher-view rows, hence 0 proposals in 2 days) -> MlxDrafter @ budget 0.2373 -> refiner none. Banner verified. 307 cc-steer tests + Linux docker ty green; CI now syncs the gate extra. NOTE: commit also lands the previously-uncommitted watcher subsystem (registry/daemon/exemplars/hooks/pipeline, ~6k lines) - it had never been pushed.
